title: Methodology-driven intake × mind-map board
prompt: Round 1 — diverge. Six philosophies for how the New Discussion panel drives a session into a METHODOLOGY, using the new mind-map board as the test case. Two are wild cards that break current assumptions (E: the panel IS a live mind-elixir canvas; F: methodology is chosen through a round-zero board, no panel change). Judge each flow on: time-to-first-spark, whether choosing a methodology feels empowering or bureaucratic, and where the mind map should live — one method among many, or the centerpiece. Selections define the synthesis vector for round 2.

options.label: Method Gallery
options.description: Named methodology cards at intake; the brief form adapts to the chosen method and the session opens already in its shape.

options.label: Seed Shape Inference
